label: 1571 CE
era_summary: Year 1571 (MDLXXI) was a common year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1571: Turkey-Venice, Papal states, 1570-73. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1571: Netherlands-Spain, 1566-1609; Spain (Moriscos in Granada), 1568-71; Spain-Netherlands, 1569-72. Maddison records GDP/capita 1585 (ESP, 1571) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
